zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton於1435年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓時，她的父親Sir Christopher Combes31歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Joseph18歲。她於1459年與Alexandre Toose de Taunton在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年在英國可瓦爾保羅享年36歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾保羅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton于1435年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Combes31岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Joseph18岁。她于1459年与Alexandre Toose de Taunton在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年在英国可瓦爾保羅享年36岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾保羅。

nameMeanings.name: "Joan"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton was born in 1435, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Christopher Combes, was 31 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, was 18. She married Alexandre Toose de Taunton in 1459, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1471, in Paul, Cornwall, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Paul, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton est née en 1435, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Christopher Combes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Alexandre Toose de Taunton en 1459, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1471, à Paul, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Paul, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton 1435 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Combes 31 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Joseph 18. Sie hat 1459 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Alexandre Toose de Taunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1471 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Paul, Cornwall, England und wurde in Paul, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton è nata il nel 1435 nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Christopher Combes, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Alexandre Toose de Taunton nel 1459, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1471, nel Paul, Cornwall, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Paul, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Tauntonが1435年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Combesは31歳，母Lady Elizabeth Josephは18歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでAlexandre Toose de Tauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年にイギリスコルンワルプアウルで36歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルプアウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Combes(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Joseph(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Alexandre Toose de Taunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 코른월 폴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 폴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton nasceu em 1435, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Christopher Combes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexandre Toose de Taunton em 1459, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1471, em Paul, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Paul, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton родилась в 1435 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Combes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Joseph, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexandre Toose de Taunton в 1459 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1471 г. в местности поул, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности поул, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Relicta Johannis "Joan" Coombes Tawse de Taunton nació en 1435, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Christopher Combes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Joseph, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Alexandre Toose de Taunton en 1459, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1471, en Paul, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Paul, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
